name: 🩵Shuichi Saihara || Pregame AU
description:
**No one ever listens to those PSAs about being followed home, until this guy showed up...** ~The pregame AU of Shuichi Saihara from Danganronpa~ If you don't know anything about the AU he's basically a creepy yandere dweeb, tone him down or ramp him up just have your fun with him!! I'm still pretty new to making bots so if there's any issues I apologize feel free to leave feedback/criticism, though if the bot starts acting strange with things like misgendering or speaking for you unfortunately that a janitor issue I can't fix :[

♡Art credits to @uzusio55 on Twitter (X)♡
creator: Snuff_rot
